title: microseris heterocarpa
intro: Microseris heterocarpa, also known as the Oregon checkermallow or checkermallow, is a rare, perennial wildflower native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Microseris heterocarpa include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat a variety of ailments.
